user.title: EVE Online — Application Credentials
user.description:
Enter your EVE Online application credentials.

**Client ID is pre-filled** — just enter your Client Secret.

If you haven't created an app yet:
1. Go to https://developers.eveonline.com/
2. Click **Create Application**
3. Set **Callback URL**: http://localhost/callback
4. Select scopes: esi-skills.read_skills.v1, esi-skills.read_skillqueue.v1, esi-wallet.read_character_wallet.v1, esi-markets.read_character_orders.v1, esi-location.read_online.v1, esi-location.read_location.v1, esi-location.read_ship_type.v1
5. Copy your **Client ID** and **Client Secret**

callback.title: Authorize EVE Online
callback.description:
1. **Click the link below** to authorize with EVE Online:

{auth_url}

2. Log in with your EVE account

3. After authorization, your browser will redirect to **http://localhost/callback** — the page will fail to load (this is normal)

4. **Copy the ENTIRE URL from your browser's address bar** and paste it below

error.empty_credentials: Client ID and Secret are required
error.no_code: No authorization code found in the URL
error.token_failed: Failed to exchange code for tokens
error.no_character: Character ID or name not found
